generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

network.title: Connection Error
network.message: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.
network.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.message: You don't have permission to access this resource.

forbidden.title: Access Denied
forbidden.message: You don't have permission to perform this action.

serverError.title: Server Error
serverError.message: Something went wrong on our end. We're working to fix it.

validation.title: Validation Error
validation.maxLength: {field} must be no more than {max} characters
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.phone: Please enter a valid phone number

auth.accountLocked: Your account has been locked. Please contact support.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.tokenExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.signUpFailed: Failed to create account. Please try again.
auth.passwordResetFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
auth.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists
auth.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Please choose a stronger password.

api.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
api.serviceUnavailable: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
api.badRequest: Invalid request. Please check your input.
api.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
api.internalError: An internal error occurred. Please try again later.

form.submitError: Failed to submit form. Please try again.
form.saveError: Failed to save changes. Please try again.
form.deleteError: Failed to delete. Please try again.
form.uploadError: Failed to upload file. Please try again.
form.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {maxSize}.
